case_title: J CIANCI VS. DOORDASH, INC ET AL

docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS (TRANSACTION ID # 78348835) FILED BY DEFENDANT DOORDASH, INC A CORPORATION

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DOORDASH, INC.'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS PENDING ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST DROP A HARD COURTESY COPY IN DEPT. 302'S INBOX. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2026 Continued To Jul-15-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Mar-06-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Doordash, Inc.'s unopposed Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings Pending Arbitration is GRANTED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
